zh.lifeSummary: 當Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith於1170年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾時，他的父親Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith27歲，母親Lady Maurice Mentieth Second Earl of Menteith11歲。他於大約1200年與Mary Menteith結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1234年1月在英國蘇格蘭培爾培斯享年64歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith于1170年出生在英国苏格兰培爾时，他的父亲Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith27岁，母亲Lady Maurice Mentieth Second Earl of Menteith11岁。他于大约1200年与Mary Menteith结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1234年1月在英国苏格兰培爾培斯享年64岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Menteith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the earldom and province of Menteith in Perthshire, named in Gaelic as ‘hill pasture (above) the Teith’, from monadh ‘hill pasture’ + Teith, a river name of obscure origin. This name was introduced to Ulster at the time of the Plantation in the 17th century, where it is now quite numerous in certain areas, particularly Tyrone.

variants.name: Montooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Monteith  .

variants.name: Mantooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish Monteith orMantach, a nickname from Gaelic manntach ‘stammering’(also ‘toothless’ in Irish), of which one early Welsh recorded form isMantath.

variants.name: Montieth
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Monteith   This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Muireadhach
meanings: An old Irish name equivalent to 'admiral;' from muir the sea, eadhach protector. Dr. Mac-dermott says the name has been Anglicised to Morogh and Maurice.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith was born in 1170, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith, was 27 and his mother, Lady Maurice Mentieth Second Earl of Menteith, was 11. He married Mary Menteith about 1200. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in January 1234, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith est né en 1170, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Maurice Mentieth Second Earl of Menteith, avait 11 ans. Il a épousé Mary Menteith environ 1200. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en janvier 1234, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith 1170 in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith 27 und seine Mutter Lady Maurice Mentieth Second Earl of Menteith 11. Er hat um 1200 Mary Menteith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb im Januar 1234 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Perth, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith è nato il nel 1170 nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Lady Maurice Mentieth Second Earl of Menteith, aveva 11 anni. Lui sposato Mary Menteith circa 1200. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel gennaio 1234, nel Perth, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteithが1170年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteithは27歳，母Lady Maurice Mentieth Second Earl of Menteithは11歳であった。約1200年にMary Menteithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1234年1月にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスで64歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith(이)가 1170년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Maurice Mentieth Second Earl of Menteith(은)는 11세였다. 그는 대략 1200년 Mary Menteith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1234년 1월 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith nasceu em 1170, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Maurice Mentieth Second Earl of Menteith, tinha 11 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Menteith aproximadamente 1200. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em janeiro de 1234, em Perth, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith родился в 1170 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Maurice Mentieth Second Earl of Menteith, 11. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Menteith около 1200 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер январь 1234 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith nació en 1170, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lady Maurice Mentieth Second Earl of Menteith, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Mary Menteith aproximadamente 1200. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en enero de 1234, en Perth, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
